flags.label: Private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Pittsburgh Technical College are 20% below the private nonprofit associate's-predominant peer median ($40.8k vs $50.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 58% at Pittsburgh Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (822 vs 1.9k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pittsburgh Technical College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.6k → $12.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pittsburgh Technical College rose 11% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.9k → $14.4k).
